message:
feat(orphan_reaper): Cx-first reap_orphans_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Close orphan_reaper.rs's last cx gap.

`reap_orphans_with_cx(cx, max_age_seconds)` threads the caller's cx
through the reap cycle with two checkpoint seams:
- Pre-flight gate before the `ps` listing fires; populates
  errors with "reap cancelled before scan".
- Per-kill gate between iterations so a cancelled caller can stop
  partway through killing a long list of stale processes; populates
  errors with "reap cancelled between kills" and returns a partial
  report.

Scan errors and individual kill errors are captured in the report
(not short-circuited) so the caller always gets a coherent snapshot
of what was reaped.

Legacy `reap_orphans` preserved unchanged — the new sibling
delegates to a new `scan_and_reap_with_cx` helper alongside the
legacy `scan_and_reap`.

Regression test
`reap_orphans_with_precancelled_cx_returns_empty_report_with_cancel_error`
verifies a pre-cancelled cx produces an empty report (0 scanned,
0 killed) with "cancelled" in the errors — i.e., ps is never
executed.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 23/23
orphan_reaper tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
